title: Communication Skills for Business
shortSummary: How to present ideas, write with authority, and communicate across every level of an organisation — from briefing agencies to presenting to boards.
whyItMatters: Mastering the Pyramid Principle, stakeholder communication, writing marketing briefs, executive presence, and tailoring your message to different audiences is the difference between a marketer who executes and one who leads.
coreConcepts: Pyramid Principle (lead with the conclusion, support with evidence)
Stakeholder communication (CFO needs financials, CEO needs strategy, team needs clarity)
Presentation structure (Problem, Insight, Solution, Call to Action)
Writing a marketing brief (objective, audience, message, channels, budget, timeline)
Active listening and asking better questions
Written vs verbal vs visual communication
